parameters: メッセージ = 何でこんな所にお金が･･･？

固有イベント呼び出し

...A condom that probably no one uses anymore is lying here... I wonder what they're
using the rubber for......
Ugh, another condom lying here... It's probably Dario's doing again...
Ew, gross... A condom is discarded here... Who in the world would do such a thing...

Come to think of it, I feel like I found a condom here before too... So there's been
a sloppy man in this village since long ago who uses rubbers and just tosses them
around...

Back when I was a kid and didn't know anything, Mana found this and it caused a huge
commotion... Luckily Elly had some sexual knowledge, so we managed to get through
it......

...Thinking about it now, the reason Elly was made to receive sex education first was
probably because they were raising that girl for this kind of purpose... The village
chief and the others had been looking at my sister with that kind of gaze all
along...

...Come to think of it now, why did Elly receive sex education before Mana...? Was it
because we were so absorbed in our adventurer training...?

Ah, Maru! Long time no see~, have you been doing well? Haha, good, good! You
remembered me...!

The stray cat Maru... the neighborhood idol cat who's been living in this village
since long ago! She should be quite old by now, but she still looks lively...!

This little one was really hard to win over at first... It took about a year of Elly
and I going to feed her together to become friends... ...and then Mana, who came to
the village later, managed to tame her in just a few days.

Even so, their first meeting was the worst... I remember back then, when Elly and I
were playing with Maru in this alley, Mana carelessly reached out and got scratched
up badly...

Even though Maru scratched her badly when they first met, Mana didn't get discouraged
and tried to be friends... It was just like Elly and Mana back in the day... It's
hard to imagine from how close they are now, but my little sister really hated Mana.

But somehow, both Maru and Elly ended up getting attached to Mana... ...Does Mana
just have a quality that makes cat-like girls like her? If so, that's an enviable
trait...
